enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Mortgage Guarantee
Companies) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Mortgage Guarantee Companies) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall come into effect on the day they are placed on the website of
the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the day they are placed on the website of the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be applicable to Mortgage Guarantee Companies (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'MGCs' and individually as a 'MGC') which has been granted
Certificate of Registration under the scheme of Registration of Mortgage Guarantee
Companies by the Reserve Bank of India.
enriched_requirements.object: Guarantee Companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'MGCs' and individually as a 'MGC') which has been granted Cert

conditions:
where not contradictory to the
contents of these Directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions specified in the following Directions, where not contradictory to the
contents of these Directions, shall be applicable to MGCs based on the layer in which the
MGC is categorised:
(1) Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration,
Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: based on the layer in which the MGC is categorised: (1) Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration, E

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Note: For ample clarity, it is clarified that the instructions contained in these
Directions shall prevail in the event of conflict, if any, with the above mentioned
Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: of conflict

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding the above, the instructions contained in these Directions shall be
applicable to MGCs in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant instructions
contained in the Directions mentioned in paragraph 4 above.
enriched_requirements.object: in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant instructions contained in the Directions mentioned in paragraph 4 abov

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC may make use of the 'Guidance Note on Operational Risk Management and
Operational Resilience', as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: 'Guidance Note on Operational Risk Management and Operational Resilience', as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC may lie in any of the layers of the regulatory structure depending on the
parameters of the scale based regulatory framework specified in paragraph 8 to 36 of
<image>
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration, Exemptions
and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: the layers of the regulatory structure depending on the parameters of the scale based regulatory framework specified in paragraph 8 to 3

conditions: If an investee company is a loss making company
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In this Chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall bear the
meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'bank' means -
Note: If an investee company is a loss making company, the earning value will be
taken at zero;
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'bank' means - Note: If an investee company is a loss making company, the earning value will be taken at

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (12) 'fair value' means the mean of the earning value and the breakup value;
enriched_requirements.object: earning value and the breakup value

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(13) 'guarantee' means a contract of guarantee as defined in section 126 of the Indian
Contract Act, 1872 (9 of 1872);
enriched_requirements.object: as defined in section 126 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872 (9 of 1872)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(14) 'housing finance company' means housing finance company as defined in Reserve
Bank of India (Housing Finance Companies) Directions, 2025;
enriched_requirements.object: defined in Reserve Bank of India (Housing Finance Companies) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(15) 'housing loan' means any loan or advance granted to an individual or any other
entity which may be specified by Reserve Bank from time to time for the purpose of
construction/ repairs/ upgradation of a house or residential property or acquisition of a
house or residential property or both, i.e., house and residential property;
enriched_requirements.object: Bank from time to time for the purpose of construction/ repairs/ upgradation of a house or residential property or acquisition
as defined in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 202

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(17) 'loss asset' means:
Note: The capital treatment for the subordinated debt shall also be as per Reserve Bank
of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025
interest by an individual or his spouse or minor child, whether singly or taken together in the shares of a company, the amoun

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(31) 'Tier 1 capital' means owned fund as reduced by investment in shares of other
nonbanking financial companies and in shares, debentures, bonds, outstanding loans
and advances including hire purchase and lease finance made to and deposits with
Note: Investment in shares of subsidiaries, companies in the same group and other
NBFCs refers to that which has been acquired by the mortgage guarantee company in
satisfaction of debt;
enriched_requirements.object: by investment in shares of other nonbanking financial companies and in shares, debentures, bonds, outstanding loans and advances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(v) such other bank which the Reserve Bank may, by notification, specify for
the purposes of these guidelines;
enriched_requirements.object: for the purposes of these guidelines

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'banking company' means a banking company as defined in Section 5(c) of the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (Act 10 of 1949);
enriched_requirements.object: defined in Section 5(c) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (Act 10 of 1949)
Bank of India from time to time
reserves as reduced by intangible assets and revaluation reserves, divided by the number of equity shares of the investee compa

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) 'carrying cost' means book value of the assets and interest accrued thereon but
not received;
enriched_requirements.object: assets and interest accrued thereon but not received

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) 'company' means a company registered under Section 3 of the Companies Act,
1956 or a corresponding provision under Companies Act, 2013;
enriched_requirements.object: Section 3 of the Companies Act, 1956 or a corresponding provision under Companies Act, 2013

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) 'corresponding new bank' means as defined in clause (da) of Section 5 of the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949;
enriched_requirements.object: (da) of Section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (8) 'creditor institution' means a bank or housing finance company;
enriched_requirements.object: finance company

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(9) 'default' means non-payment on the due date of any principal debt or interest
thereon payable by a borrower to any creditor institution;
enriched_requirements.object: date of any principal debt or interest thereon payable by a borrower to any creditor institution

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(10) 'doubtful asset' means an asset which remains a sub-standard asset for a period
exceeding 12 months;
enriched_requirements.object: a sub-standard asset for a period exceeding 12 months

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(11) 'earning value' means the value of an equity share computed by taking the average
of profits after tax as reduced by the preference dividend and adjusted for extra-ordinary
and non-recurring items, for the immediately preceding three years and further divided by
the number of equity shares of the investee company and capitalised at the following rate
:
enriched_requirements.object: equity share computed by taking the average of profits after tax as reduced by the preference dividend and adjusted for extra-ordinary

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The words or expressions used in this Chapter but not defined herein and defined in
the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 (Act 2 of 1934), or the Banking Regulation Act, 1949
(Act 10 of 1949) shall have the same meaning as assigned to them under the said Acts.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to them under the said Acts

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any other words or expressions not defined in the said Acts shall have the same meaning
as assigned to them in the Companies Act, 1956 or Companies Act, 2013.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to them in the Companies Act, 1956 or Companies Act, 2013

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The MGC shall put in place approved policies and establish periodic review
mechanisms to ensure sound processes and systems.
enriched_requirements.object: policies and establish periodic review mechanisms to ensure sound processes and systems

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Compensation: The policy shall include, inter alia, constitution of a Nomination and
Remuneration Committee, principles for fixed/variable pay structures and
malus/clawback provisions.
enriched_requirements.object: of a Nomination and Remuneration Committee, principles for fixed/variable pay structures and malus/clawback provisio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall commence the business of providing mortgage guarantee after -
(1) obtaining a certificate of registration from the Reserve Bank;
enriched_requirements.object: providing mortgage guarantee after - (1) obtaining a certificate of registration from the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(2) having a net owned fund of ₹100 crore or such other higher amount, as the
Reserve Bank may, by notification, specify.

Every MGC shall make an application for registration to the Reserve Bank in such
form as may be specified by the Reserve Bank for the purpose.
enriched_requirements.object: registration to the Reserve Bank in such form as may be specified by the Reserve Bank for the purpose

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Reserve Bank, for the purpose of considering the application for registration, shall
require to be satisfied that the following conditions are fulfilled :-
<image>
(1) the MGC shall primarily transact the business of providing mortgage guarantee.
enriched_requirements.object: that the following conditions are fulfilled :- <image> (1) the MGC shall primarily transact the business of providing mortgage

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A
MGC shall be deemed to comply with the above when at least 90 per cent of the
business turnover is mortgage guarantee business or at least 90 per cent of the gross
income is from mortgage guarantee business (which includes the income derived from
reinvesting the income generated from mortgage guarantee business);
enriched_requirements.object: with the above when at least 90 per cent of the business turnover is mortgage guarantee business or at least 90 per cent of the gr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) the MGC is or shall be in a position to pay its liabilities arising from the contracts
of guarantee it may enter into;
enriched_requirements.object: to pay its liabilities arising from the contracts of guarantee it may enter into

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) the general character of the management or the proposed management of the
MGC shall not be prejudicial to the public interest;
enriched_requirements.object: public interest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) a MGC shall have a well diversified shareholding and shall not be a subsidiary of
any other company including a company registered or incorporated under any law in
force outside India.
enriched_requirements.object: any other company including a company registered or incorporated under any law in force outside India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, no individual, association or body of individuals whether
incorporated or not, partnership firm, company or company registered or incorporated
under any law in force outside India shall, directly or indirectly, have any controlling
interest in the MGC.
enriched_requirements.object: have any controlling interest in the MGC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) Policy as notified from time to time by the Reserve
Bank, shall apply to a MGC.

conditions: Provided that if the foreign entity has substantial interest in the applicant MGC
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that if the foreign entity has substantial interest in the applicant MGC,
it should be regulated by a home country financial regulator and should itself
preferably be a MGC and have a good track record of operating as a MGC.
enriched_requirements.object: has substantial interest in the applicant MGC, it should be regulated by a home country financial regulator and should itself pr

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(8) Investment from FATF non-compliant jurisdictions: MGC shall refer to the
instructions as prescribed in paragraph 47 and 48 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale
Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in paragraph 47 and 48 of Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Registration, Exemptions a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(9) The public interest shall be served by the grant of certificate of registration to the
MGC to commence or to carry on the business in India.
enriched_requirements.object: grant of certificate of registration to the MGC to commence or to carry on the business in India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(10) The grant of certificate of registration shall not be prejudicial to the operation and
growth of the housing finance sector of the country.
enriched_requirements.object: operation and growth of the housing finance sector of the country

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(12) Any other condition, fulfillment of which in the opinion of the Reserve Bank, shall
be necessary to ensure that the commencement of or carrying on the business in India
by a MGC shall not be prejudicial to the public interest and the housing finance sector
in India.
enriched_requirements.object: public interest and the housing finance sector in India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Reserve Bank may, after being satisfied that the conditions specified in sub
paragraphs of paragraph 13 are fulfilled, grant a certificate of registration subject to such
conditions which it may consider fit to impose.
enriched_requirements.object: that the conditions specified in sub paragraphs of paragraph 13 are fulfilled, grant a certificate of registration subject to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The MGC shall be under the regulatory and supervisory jurisdiction of the Reserve
Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: and supervisory jurisdiction of the Reserve Bank

conditions:
if such
company -
(1) ceases to carry on the business of providing mortgage guarantee in India
enriched_requirements.object: registration granted to a MGC

conditions:
If a MGC undertakes any other business as specified in Section 45I(c) of the RBI Act
1934 within the permitted limit
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If a MGC undertakes any other business as specified in Section 45I(c) of the RBI Act
1934 within the permitted limit, prudential and other regulations as applicable (including
valuation of investments, asset classification and provisioning, etc.,) for an NBFC-ICC as
prescribed in paragraph 5 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies
- Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025
shall be applicable.
The MGC shall not carry out insurance business.

enriched_requirements.object: it shall be a contract of guarantee under Section 126 of the Indian Contract Act, 1872
and the guarantee obtained shall be free from coercion, undue influence, fraud, misrepresentation, and / or mistake u

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) it shall guarantee the repayment of the principal and interest outstanding in
the housing loan account of the borrower, up to the amount of guarantee;
enriched_requirements.object: the principal and interest outstanding in the housing loan account of the borrower, up to the amount of guarantee

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) the guarantor shall pay the guaranteed amount on invocation without any
adjustment against the realisable value of the mortgage property;
enriched_requirements.object: on invocation without any adjustment against the realisable value of the mortgage property

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and
(5) it shall be a tri-partite contract among the borrower, the creditor institution
and the MGC, which provides the mortgage guarantee.
enriched_requirements.object: among the borrower, the creditor institution and the MGC, which provides the mortgage guarantee

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Acceptance of public deposits - A MGC shall not accept public deposits.

External Commercial Borrowings - A MGC shall not avail External Commercial
Borrowings.

A MGC shall have a minimum net owned fund of ₹100 crore at the time of
commencement of business, which shall be reviewed for enhancement after three years.
enriched_requirements.object: owned fund of ₹100 crore at the time of commencement of business, which shall be reviewed for enhancement after three years

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall maintain a capital adequacy ratio consisting of Tier 1 and Tier 2 capital
which shall not be less than 10 per cent of its aggregate risk weighted assets of on
balance sheet and of risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items or any other
percentage that may be prescribed by the Reserve Bank for the purpose, from time to
time.
enriched_requirements.object: per cent of its aggregate risk weighted assets of on balance sheet and of risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items or any other

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall maintain at least six per cent of its aggregate risk weighted assets of on
balance sheet and of risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items as Tier 1 capital.
enriched_requirements.object: per cent of its aggregate risk weighted assets of on balance sheet and of risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items as Tier

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The total of Tier 2 capital, at any point of time, shall not exceed 100 per cent of Tier 1
capital.
enriched_requirements.object: of Tier 1 capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The aggregate shall be taken into account for reckoning the
minimum capital ratio.
enriched_requirements.object: for reckoning the minimum capital ratio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The risk weighted asset shall be calculated as the weighted
aggregate of funded items as detailed hereunder:
Risk Weightage
Items of Assets - On-Balance Sheet Items
per cent
Notes:
(1) Netting may be done only in respect of assets where provisions for depreciation or
for bad and doubtful debts have been made.
enriched_requirements.object: weighted aggregate of funded items as detailed hereunder: Risk Weightage Items of Assets - On-Balance Sheet Items per cent Notes:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Assets which have been deducted from owned fund to arrive at net owned fund shall
have a weightage of 'zero'.
enriched_requirements.object: 'zero'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) While calculating the aggregate of funded exposure of a borrower for the purpose
of assignment of risk weight, a MGC may net off the amount of cash margin/ caution money/ security deposits (against which right to set-off is available) held as collateral against the advances out of the total outstanding exposure of the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: of cash margin/ caution money/ security deposits (against which right to set-off is available) held as collateral against the advan

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The credit equivalent value of each item shall have to be again multiplied by the risk
weight as applicable to the respective counterparties.
enriched_requirements.object: multiplied by the risk weight as applicable to the respective counterparties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The aggregate risk weighted value
shall be taken into account for reckoning the minimum capital ratio.
enriched_requirements.object: for reckoning the minimum capital ratio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The credit equivalent
value of the off-balance sheet items shall be calculated as per the credit conversion
factors for non-funded items as detailed hereunder:
Nature of Item Credit Conversion Factor - Percentage
i) Mortgage Guarantees 50
ii) Underwriting obligations in r/o capital investment such as shares / debentures, etc
iii) Partly-paid shares / debentures 100
iv) Lease contracts entered into but yet to be executed 100
v) Other contingent liabilities 50
Note: Cash margins / deposits shall be deducted before applying the conversion factor.
enriched_requirements.object: the credit conversion factors for non-funded items as detailed hereunder: Nature of Item Credit Conversion Factor - Percentage i)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A single guarantee shall not exceed 10 per cent of the company's Tier 1 and Tier 2
capital.
enriched_requirements.object: of the company's Tier 1 and Tier 2 capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
MGC in Middle and above layers shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in
Paragraph 54 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential
Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025 in this regard.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in Paragraph 54 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequa

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall book income on accrual basis on securities of corporate bodies / public
sector undertakings in respect of which the payment of interest and repayment of principal
have been guaranteed by the Central Government or a State Government, provided
interest is serviced regularly and as such is not in arrears.
enriched_requirements.object: basis on securities of corporate bodies / public sector undertakings in respect of which the payment of interest and repayment of principal have been guaranteed by the Central Government or a State Government

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall book income from dividend on shares of corporate bodies on accrual
basis provided dividend on the shares has been declared by the corporate body in its
Annual General Meeting and the owner's right to receive payments is established.
enriched_requirements.object: on shares of corporate bodies on accrual basis provided dividend on the shares has been declared by the corporate body in it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall book income from Government securities and bonds and debentures of
corporate bodies on accrual basis, where interest rates on these instruments are pre-
determined and provided interest is serviced regularly and as such is not in arrears.
enriched_requirements.object: securities and bonds and debentures of corporate bodies on accrual basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A MGC shall book income from units of mutual funds on cash basis.
enriched_requirements.object: of mutual funds on cash basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Income including interest/ discount or any other charges on an asset which is NPA or
on an asset which is NPA and is taken over from creditor institution on happening of
trigger event shall be recognised only on cash basis.
enriched_requirements.object: cash basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall account the premium or fee on the mortgage guarantee contracts as an
income in the profit and loss account in accordance with the applicable Accounting
Standards.
enriched_requirements.object: fee on the mortgage guarantee contracts as an income in the profit and loss account in accordance with the applicable Accountin

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The amount of unearned premium shall be shown as a separate line on the
liability side of the balance sheet.
enriched_requirements.object: separate line on the liability side of the balance sheet

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In respect of any other business undertaken by the MGC as specified in Section 45
I(c) of the Act, within the permitted limit, income shall be recognised as per income
recognition norms prescribed for such assets in these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: income recognition norms prescribed for such assets in these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall, after taking into account the degree of well defined credit weaknesses
and extent of dependence on collateral security for realisation, classify its assets, loans
and advances and any other forms of credit into the following classes, namely:
(1) Standard assets;
enriched_requirements.object: account the degree of well defined credit weaknesses and extent of dependence on collateral security for realisation, classify its

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The class of assets referred to above shall not be upgraded merely as a result of
rescheduling, unless it satisfies the conditions as stipulated by the Reserve Bank from
time to time, required for the upgradation.
enriched_requirements.object: a result of rescheduling

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in Paragraph 9 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation and
Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in Paragraph 9 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall not lend to
(1) any single borrower exceeding 15 per cent of its Tier 1 capital;
enriched_requirements.object: single borrower exceeding 15 per cent of its Tier 1 capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 2[The applicable Tier 1 Capital for compliance with the norms stated in sub-
paragraphs 41(1) and 41(2) above, shall be determined based on the MGC's latest
available financial statements (audited or subject to limited review).]
(4) 3[The term "Tier 1 Capital" in this context shall be as defined in paragraph
8(31) of the Master Directions.]
enriched_requirements.object: the MGC's latest available financial statements (audited or subject to limited review)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall formulate a policy in respect of exposures to a single party / a single
group of parties.
enriched_requirements.object: respect of exposures to a single party / a single group of parties

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notes:
(1) For determining the limits, off-balance sheet exposures shall be converted
into credit risk by applying the conversion factors as explained in these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: risk by applying the conversion factors as explained in these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The investments in debentures for the purposes specified in this paragraph
shall be treated as credit and not investment.
enriched_requirements.object: and not investment

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) These ceilings shall be applicable to credit exposure by such a MGC to
companies/ firms in its own group as well as to the borrower company's group.
enriched_requirements.object: exposure by such a MGC to companies/ firms in its own group as well as to the borrower company's group

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A MGC shall create and maintain a 'Contingency Reserve' on an ongoing basis.
enriched_requirements.object: 'Contingency Reserve' on an ongoing basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall appropriate each year at least 40 per cent of the premium or fee earned
during that accounting year or 25 per cent of the profit (after provisions and tax),
whichever is higher, to the Contingency Reserve.
enriched_requirements.object: least 40 per cent of the premium or fee earned during that accounting year or 25 per cent of the profit (after provisions and

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of inadequate profits, such appropriation shall either result in or increase the
amount of carry forward loss.
enriched_requirements.object: increase the amount of carry forward loss

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC may appropriate a lower percentage of the premium or fee earned during any
accounting year subject to a minimum of at least 24 per cent of the premium or fee earned
when the provisions made each year towards losses on account of settlement of
mortgage guarantee claims exceeds 35 per cent of the premium or fee earned during that
accounting year.
enriched_requirements.object: of the premium or fee earned during any accounting year subject to a minimum of at least 24 per cent of the premium or

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall ensure that the Contingency Reserve is built up to at least five per cent
of the total outstanding mortgage guarantee commitments.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve is built up to at least five per cent of the total outstanding mortgage guarantee commitments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall retain the amounts appropriated each year to the Contingency Reserve
for a minimum period of seven subsequent years which shall be eligible for reversal only
in the eighth year subject to the condition in paragraph 47 above.
enriched_requirements.object: each year to the Contingency Reserve for a minimum period of seven subsequent years which shall be eligible for revers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall utilize the Contingency Reserve without the prior approval of the Reserve
Bank solely for the purpose of meeting and making good the losses suffered by the
mortgaged guarantee holders only after exhausting all other avenues and options to
recoup the losses;
enriched_requirements.object: without the prior approval of the Reserve Bank solely for the purpose of meeting and making good the losses suffered b

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
in all other cases of utilization, prior approval of Reserve Bank shall
be obtained.

A MGC shall show the amount of 'Contingency Reserve' as a separate line item on
the liability side of the balance sheet;
enriched_requirements.object: 'Contingency Reserve' as a separate line item on the liability side of the balance sheet

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
however, Contingency Reserve may be treated as
'free reserve' for the purpose of net owned fund.
enriched_requirements.object: reserve' for the purpose of net owned fund

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 10 to 12 of Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation
<image>
and Disclosures) Directions, 2025, paragraph 16 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025 and
paragraph 34 to 36 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in paragraphs 10 to 12 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Prese

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A MGC shall hold provisions for losses in respect of such invoked guarantees
pending recovery of assets.
enriched_requirements.object: in respect of such invoked guarantees pending recovery of assets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The amount of provisions required to be held shall be equal to the contract-wise
aggregate of 'amount of invocation' after adjusting the realisable value of the assets
held by the company in respect of each housing loan where the guarantee has been
invoked.
enriched_requirements.object: contract-wise aggregate of 'amount of invocation' after adjusting the realisable value of the assets held by the company in respect of

conditions:
In case the realisable value of the assets held in respect of any invoked guarantee
is more than the amount of invocation
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) In case the realisable value of the assets held in respect of any invoked guarantee
is more than the amount of invocation, the excess shall not be adjusted against the
shortfall in other invoked guarantees.
enriched_requirements.object: shortfall in other invoked guarantees

conditions:
In case the amount of provisions already held is in excess of the amount as
computed above
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) In case the amount of provisions already held is in excess of the amount as
computed above, the excess provision may be reversed after full recovery or closure
of the invoked guarantee amount or after the account becomes standard.
enriched_requirements.object: recovery or closure of the invoked guarantee amount or after the account becomes standard

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The amount of provisions made each year shall be shown as a separate line item
in the Profit and Loss Account.
enriched_requirements.object: separate line item in the Profit and Loss Account

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) The amount of provision held for losses on settlement of invoked guarantees shall
be shown as a separate line item on the liability side of the balance sheet.
enriched_requirements.object: separate line item on the liability side of the balance sheet

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) A MGC shall hold provisions in respect of such defaulted housing loans where the
trigger event is yet to occur or the guarantee is yet to be invoked.
enriched_requirements.object: of such defaulted housing loans where the trigger event is yet to occur or the guarantee is yet to be invoked

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The amount of provisions required to be held shall be arrived at on an actuarial
basis depending upon the estimates of loss frequency and loss severity for incurred
but not reported losses which are derived from historic data, trends, economic factors
and other statistical data in relation to paid claims, the provisions held for claims
settled, risk statistics, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: an actuarial basis depending upon the estimates of loss frequency and loss severity for incurred but not reported losses which are de

conditions:
In case the amount of provisions already held is in excess of the amount as
computed above
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(5) In case the amount of provisions already held is in excess of the amount as
computed above, the excess shall not be reversed.

(7) The amount of provision held for IBNR losses shall be shown as a separate line
item on the liability side of the balance sheet.
enriched_requirements.object: separate line item on the liability side of the balance sheet

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Subject to what has been mentioned above, a MGC shall, after taking into account
the time lag between an account becoming non-performing, its recognition as such, the
realisation of the security and the erosion over time in the value of security charged, make
provision against each class as provided hereunder :-
(1) Mortgage guarantee assets
The provisioning requirement in respect of mortgage guarantee assets shall be as under:
Notes:
(1) The provisions on standard asset should not be reckoned for arriving at net NPAs.
enriched_requirements.object: account the time lag between an account becoming non-performing, its recognition as such, the realisation of the security and the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) It is clarified that income recognition on and provisioning against NPAs are two
different aspects of prudential norms and provisions as per the norms are required to be made on NPAs on total outstanding balances.
enriched_requirements.object: NPAs on total outstanding balances

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Loss
The entire asset shall be written off.

conditions: If the assets are permitted to remain in the books for any reason
enriched_requirements.full_sentence: If the assets are permitted to remain in the books for any reason, 100 per cent of the outstanding should be provided for;

(a) 100% provision to the extent to which the advance is not covered
by the realisable value of the security to which the MGC has a valid recourse shall be made.

(iii) Sub-
A general provision of 10 per cent of total outstanding shall be made.

(iv) Standard
A MGC should make general provisions for standard asset on the following basis;
enriched_requirements.object: standard asset on the following basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 86 to 100 of Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in paragraph 86 to 100 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Asse

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 13 to paragraph 15 of
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements:
Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in paragraph 13 to paragraph 15 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statemen

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Disclosure requirements as prescribed in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Financial Statements: Presentation and Disclosures) Directions,
2025 shall be applicable to MGCs.

MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Declaration of Dividends)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Declaration of Dividends) Dir

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall invest only in the following instruments:
(1) Government Securities;
enriched_requirements.object: following instruments: (1) Government Securities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A MGC shall not invest in subsidiaries and joint ventures.
enriched_requirements.object: joint ventures

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that a MGC may hold investments in equity shares of any company which
may be quoted or unquoted or other unquoted investments acquired in satisfaction
of its debts which shall be disposed of by the MGC within a period of three years or
within such period as extended by the Reserve Bank, from the date of such
acquisition.
enriched_requirements.object: the MGC within a period of three years or within such period as extended by the Reserve Bank, from the date of such acquisition

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC may undertake transactions in Government securities through its gilt account
or its demat account or any other account, as permitted by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: securities through its gilt account or its demat account or any other account, as permitted by the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall hold not less than 25 per cent of its total investment portfolio in Central
and State Government securities.
enriched_requirements.object: 25 per cent of its total investment portfolio in Central and State Government securities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The remaining investments may be invested as the Board considers prudent, but with
a ceiling of 25 per cent in any one category, i.e., listed and rated corporate bonds and
debentures or debt oriented mutual fund units, etc.
enriched_requirements.object: Board considers prudent, but with a ceiling of 25 per cent in any one category, i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board may fix an appropriate sub-limit for individual investments within each
category of instruments specified in paragraph 59 above.
enriched_requirements.object: for individual investments within each category of instruments specified in paragraph 59 above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall invest only in bonds / debentures and debt oriented mutual funds having
at least Minimum Investment Grade Rating (MIGR) assigned by the SEBI registered
Rating Agencies.
enriched_requirements.object: / debentures and debt oriented mutual funds having at least Minimum Investment Grade Rating (MIGR) assigned by the SEBI registere

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Quoted investments shall, for the purposes of valuation, be grouped into the following
categories, viz.,
(1) Government securities including treasury bills,
(2) Government guaranteed bonds/ securities;
enriched_requirements.object: of valuation, be grouped into the following categories, viz

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Quoted investments for each category except Government Securities including
treasury bills, Government guaranteed bonds or securities shall be valued at cost or
market value whichever is lower.
enriched_requirements.object: or market value whichever is lower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The investments made towards Government securities, quoted or otherwise,
government guaranteed securities and bonds not exceeding the capital may be treated
as 'Held to Maturity' (HTM) for the purpose of valuation and accounted for accordingly.
enriched_requirements.object: to Maturity' (HTM) for the purpose of valuation and accounted for accordingly

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC may, at its discretion, effect the transfer of the government security from HTM
category to AFS category at the beginning of each half year, on April 01 or October 01,
with the approval of the Board, provided the principal amount is reinvested in another
Government security.
enriched_requirements.object: effect the transfer of the government security from HTM category to AFS category at the beginning of each half year, on April 01 or October 01, with the approval of the Board

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investments classified under HTM need not be marked to market and shall be carried
at acquisition cost, unless it is more than the face value, in which case the premium shall
be amortised over the period remaining to maturity.
enriched_requirements.object: cost

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The book value of the security shall continue to be reduced to the extent of the amount
amortised during the relevant accounting period.
enriched_requirements.object: to the extent of the amount amortised during the relevant accounting period

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The investments in each category shall be considered scrip-wise and the cost and
market value aggregated for all investments in each category.
enriched_requirements.object: the cost and market value aggregated for all investments in each category

conditions:
If the aggregate market value for the category is less than the aggregate cost for that
category
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the aggregate market value for the category is less than the aggregate cost for that
category, the net depreciation shall be provided for or charged to the profit and loss
account.
enriched_requirements.object: charged to the profit and loss account

conditions:
If the aggregate market value for the category exceeds the aggregate cost for
the category
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the aggregate market value for the category exceeds the aggregate cost for
the category, the net appreciation shall be ignored.

Depreciation in one category of investments shall not be set off against appreciation
in another category.
enriched_requirements.object: appreciation in another category

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: All other investments shall be MTM in accordance with these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: with these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Unquoted investments acquired in satisfaction of its debts shall be valued as under:
(1) Unquoted investments in the units of mutual funds shall be valued at the net
asset value (NAV) declared by the mutual fund in respect of each particular
scheme;
enriched_requirements.object: (1) Unquoted investments in the units of mutual funds shall be valued at the net asset value (NAV) declared by the mutual fund in

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Unquoted equity shares shall be valued at cost or breakup value, whichever
is lower.
enriched_requirements.object: or breakup value, whichever is lower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, a MGC may substitute fair value for the breakup value of the
shares, if considered necessary.
enriched_requirements.object: the breakup value of the shares

conditions:
Where the balance sheet of the investee
company is not available for two years
enriched_requirements.object: per company

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Unquoted preference shares shall be valued at cost or face value,
whichever is lower.
enriched_requirements.object: or face value, whichever is lower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Note: Unquoted debentures shall be treated as term loans or other type of
credit facilities depending upon the tenure of such debentures for the
purpose of income recognition and asset classification.
enriched_requirements.object: loans or other type of credit facilities depending upon the tenure of such debentures for the purpose of income recognition and ass

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC with the approval of the Board shall frame an investment policy in tune with
these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: in tune with these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 8 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in paragraph 8 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 17 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in paragraph 17 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It shall be
ensured that at least one of the non-executive Directors of the Board of the company in
the Audit Committee shall be a Chartered Accountant.
enriched_requirements.object: least one of the non-executive Directors of the Board of the company in the Audit Committee shall be a Chartered Accountant

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 9 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in paragraph 9 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 26 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in paragraph 26 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 27 and 28 of Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in paragraph 27 and 28 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 202

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 29 to 37 of Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in paragraph 29 to 37 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall keep one or more registers in which shall be entered the particulars of
guarantee provided by the company, namely,
(1) name and address of the borrower / co-borrower,
(2) date and amount of loan sanctioned to the borrower,
(3) brief description of the property including the site / location of the property,
(4) the nature of security available for the loan,
(5) tenure of the loan,
(6) amount of each installment and due date for the payment of each installment,
(7) name and address of the bank or housing finance company to whom the guarantee has been provided,
(8) date and amount of the guarantee, and
(9) duration of the guarantee.
enriched_requirements.object: registers in which shall be entered the particulars of guarantee provided by the company, namely, (1) name and address of the borrowe

conditions:
where the MGC has provided a guarantee shall be as stipulated in the contract
of guarantee entered into by and between the MGC
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The liability of the MGC in respect of a secured housing loan granted by a creditor
institution where the MGC has provided a guarantee shall be as stipulated in the contract
of guarantee entered into by and between the MGC, the creditor institution and the
borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: the contract of guarantee entered into by and between the MGC, the creditor institution and the borrower

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
On any day after a trigger event, the creditor institution, which has obtained a
mortgage guarantee from a MGC, shall be entitled to invoke the guarantee against the
MGC.
enriched_requirements.object: the guarantee against the MGC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The MGC shall make good the guarantee liability without demur as and when a notice
of demand for the payment of the guarantee liability in respect of the mortgage guarantee
provided by it in favour of a bank or a housing finance company is received by it.
enriched_requirements.object: liability without demur as and when a notice of demand for the payment of the guarantee liability in respect of the mortgage g

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, for small value housing loans i.e
housing loans up to ₹20 lakh (which get categorized as priority sector advances), LTV
ratio should not exceed 90 per cent.

enriched_requirements.object: satisfied, amongst others, with the following: (1) that the loans are secured by a valid mortgage

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Every MGC shall communicate change of address, directors, auditors, etc., as
prescribed in paragraph 6 and 7 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: directors, auditors, etc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A MGC shall not provide a mortgage guarantee for a housing loan which is not
secured by a valid mortgage of the house / residential property that is or is proposed to
be acquired by such loan.
enriched_requirements.object: for a housing loan which is not secured by a valid mortgage of the house / residential property that is or is proposed to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
No commissions, rebates or inducements: A MGC shall not pay commissions,
rebates, or other inducements for referral of mortgage guarantee business to any person.
enriched_requirements.object: other inducements for referral of mortgage guarantee business to any person

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Prohibition on guaranteeing mortgage originations of Related Party: A MGC
shall not provide guarantees on mortgage originations of promoters, its / their
subsidiaries, associates and related parties or subsidiaries, associates and related
parties of MGC including companies where the MGC has a material investment or interest
of five percent or more of the shareholding.
enriched_requirements.object: originations of promoters, its / their subsidiaries, associates and related parties or subsidiaries, associates and rel

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investments: A MGC shall not invest in notes or other evidences of indebtedness
secured by a mortgage or other lien upon real property.
enriched_requirements.object: other evidences of indebtedness secured by a mortgage or other lien upon real property

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This shall not apply to obligations
secured by real property, or contracts for the sale of real property, which obligations or
contracts of sale are acquired in the course of the good faith settlement of claims under
policies issued by the MGC, or in good faith disposition of real property so acquired.
enriched_requirements.object: by real property, or contracts for the sale of real property, which obligations or contracts of sale are acquired in the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Loans against own shares of the MGC are prohibited
(1) A MGC shall not lend against its own shares.
enriched_requirements.object: shares

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Any outstanding loan against its own shares shall be recovered by the MGC as
per the repayment schedule before grant of Certificate of Registration to it.
enriched_requirements.object: MGC as per the repayment schedule before grant of Certificate of Registration to it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Board of Directors of a MGC shall frame a policy for the company for providing
mortgage guarantee to creditor institutions.
enriched_requirements.object: the company for providing mortgage guarantee to creditor institutions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such policy shall, inter alia, stipulate the
following:
(1) the fee or premium chargeable for providing a mortgage guarantee based on
specific identified criteria including the quantum of loan;
enriched_requirements.object: the following: (1) the fee or premium chargeable for providing a mortgage guarantee based on specific identified criteria incl

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of providing mortgage guarantee, the MGC shall prepare a detailed
scheme duly approved by its Board of Directors.
enriched_requirements.object: duly approved by its Board of Directors

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The scheme shall contain, inter alia, the
following matters:
(1) the quality of a housing loan,
(2) the maximum portion of a housing loan granted by a bank or a housing finance
company to a borrower, that may be covered under the contract of guarantee,
(3) the minimum and the maximum LTV ratio of a housing loan proposed to be covered
under the contract of guarantee,
(4) the fee or premium or charge indicating the manner for the payment there of,
payable by a borrower to the MGC in consideration for the contract of guarantee,
(5) the liability of the MGC as to whether the liability will be coextensive with that of
the borrower or otherwise, and
(6) the conditions governing the issue as to which party of the MGC or a bank / housing
finance company will be required to effect recoveries from the borrower after the
mortgage guarantee is invoked and the guarantee liability is made good by the MGC
to the bank or housing finance company.
enriched_requirements.object: following matters: (1) the quality of a housing loan, (2) the maximum portion of a housing loan granted by a bank or a housin

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Whenever a MGC obtains counter-guarantee cover in respect of the housing loans
guaranteed by it from another MGC, the MGC and the counter-guarantee company shall
establish and maintain the reserves required for a MGC in India in appropriate proportions
in relation to the risk retained by the original MGC and ceded to the assuming counter-
guarantee company so that the total reserves established shall not be less than the
reserves required under Indian law for a MGC.
enriched_requirements.object: reserves required under Indian law for a MGC

conditions: In case the counter-guarantee company is not regulated by the regulator(s) in India
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case the counter-guarantee company is not regulated by the regulator(s) in India,
the MGC guaranteeing the claim shall hold relevant reserves and provisions in respect of
all outstanding mortgage guarantee contracts issued by it.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions in respect of all outstanding mortgage guarantee contracts issued by it

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
MGC shall refer to the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 14 and 15 of Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as prescribed in paragraphs 14 and 15 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The Directions,
instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall
continue to remain repealed.

Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
enriched_requirements.object: by the provisions thereof

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under
these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: by these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, the repeal
of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
a.
enriched_requirements.object: affect: a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced and
any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions,
instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
enriched_requirements.object: and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interpretations
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to remove
any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these Directions, the
RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect of any matter
covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the
RBI shall be final and binding.
